name: Empty Bottle
description: Beloved indie/punk/experimental dive in Ukrainian Village
scrape_notes: Exclude DJ nights, dance parties, and comedy shows. Only include live band performances. Band names are usually in the event title.

name: Schubas Tavern
description: Intimate Lakeview venue with strong indie and singer-songwriter bookings
scrape_notes: Shared calendar platform with Lincoln Hall. Ignore 'Private Event' or corporate listings.

name: Lincoln Hall
description: Mid-size Lincoln Park venue, quality indie and rock bookings
scrape_notes: Shared calendar platform with Schubas. Ignore 'Private Event' or corporate listings.

name: The Hideout
description: Scrappy neighborhood bar with indie, country, and punk bookings
scrape_notes: Small venue. Some events are political fundraisers or comedy — only include live music. Bands sometimes listed as 'w/' supporting acts.

name: Sleeping Village
description: Avondale venue for underground, experimental, and indie shows
scrape_notes: Mix of live music and DJ nights. Only include shows with band/artist names, exclude pure DJ events.

name: Subterranean
description: Wicker Park multi-level venue with indie, metal, and hip-hop
scrape_notes: Multi-genre venue. Include all live performance types.

name: Thalia Hall
description: Historic Pilsen ballroom, mid-size indie and folk bookings
scrape_notes: Also hosts film screenings and private events — exclude those, only include live music.

name: Beat Kitchen
description: Roscoe Village club with eclectic indie and rock bookings
scrape_notes: Live music focused. Include all band shows.
